name: loop-engineer
description: Loop engineering wizard for Claude Code. Answer 2 questions and Claude orchestrates a fully autonomous 7-agent team (tool-scout, researcher, developer, qa-tester, verifier, auditor, memory-keeper) until your goal is met.
